description: v1 AI-crawler list consumed by /geo-audit. Each entry names a crawler user-agent token, its scope (training vs retrieval-at-inference vs both), and the primary vendor / use case. Single source of truth — the audit's robots.txt-directive check iterates this list.

crawlers.name: GPTBot
crawlers.primary_use: OpenAI — trains foundation models on the open web. Robots.txt-honouring crawler distinct from ChatGPT-User (which fires at inference time).

crawlers.name: ChatGPT-User
crawlers.primary_use: OpenAI — fetches a URL on demand when a ChatGPT user (or a ChatGPT plugin / browsing action) asks the model to read it. Inference-time, not training.

crawlers.name: OAI-SearchBot
crawlers.primary_use: OpenAI — indexer behind SearchGPT / ChatGPT Search. Distinct from GPTBot (training) and ChatGPT-User (per-conversation fetch).

crawlers.name: ClaudeBot
crawlers.primary_use: Anthropic — primary web-crawler user agent for training Claude foundation models.

crawlers.name: Claude-Web
crawlers.primary_use: Anthropic — older identifier sometimes seen for inference-time fetches; retained for backward-compat in robots.txt.

crawlers.name: anthropic-ai
crawlers.primary_use: Anthropic — generic identifier some operators apply to Anthropic-originated traffic; retain for robots.txt rules that pre-date ClaudeBot.

crawlers.name: Google-Extended
crawlers.primary_use: Google — opt-out token (set via robots.txt) that excludes a site from Bard / Gemini training without affecting Googlebot search indexing. Disallowing this does NOT remove the site from Google Search.

crawlers.name: PerplexityBot
crawlers.primary_use: Perplexity AI — crawls and cites pages in answer panels with source links. High traffic for documentation-shaped content.

crawlers.name: CCBot
crawlers.primary_use: Common Crawl — foundational open web corpus used by many model labs. Disallowing CCBot is the broadest opt-out signal.

crawlers.name: Bytespider
crawlers.primary_use: ByteDance — heavy crawler historically associated with training data collection. Often listed alongside the major LLM crawlers in robots.txt opt-outs.

crawlers.name: Applebot-Extended
crawlers.primary_use: Apple — opt-out token analogous to Google-Extended, gating Apple Intelligence training without affecting Spotlight / Siri search indexing via Applebot.

crawlers.name: cohere-ai
crawlers.primary_use: Cohere — crawler identifier for Cohere's foundation-model training pipeline.
